intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把公共倒计时、旧式钟表时间和最后的拟人笑点读顺。

sentences.text: On Wednesday evening, we went to the Town Hall.
sentences.focus_zh: Town Hall 在这里是公共地标，不是单纯的办事大厅。

sentences.text: It was the last day of the year and a large crowd of people had gathered under the Town Hall clock.
sentences.focus_zh: last day of the year 是跨年夜语境，crowd 和 gathered 要读出人群已经聚好的感觉。

sentences.text: It would strike twelve in twenty minutes' time.
sentences.focus_zh: strike twelve 是大钟敲响十二点，in twenty minutes' time 是从当时开始再过二十分钟。

sentences.text: Fifteen minutes passed and then, at five to twelve, the clock stopped.
sentences.focus_zh: five to twelve 是 11:55，读的时候要让听者听出倒计时快到了。

sentences.text: The big minute hand did not move.
sentences.focus_zh: minute hand 是分针，也就是钟面上指分钟的长针。

sentences.text: Suddenly someone shouted. 'It's two minutes past twelve! The clock has stopped!'
sentences.focus_zh: shouted 要读出人群里突然有人大声提醒，two minutes past twelve 是 12:02。

sentences.text: The big clock refused to welcome the New Year. At that moment, everybody began to laugh and sing.
sentences.focus_zh: refused to welcome 是拟人笑点，后面 laugh and sing 把尴尬变成庆祝。
